base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of weapons_menu — a ui (menu_screen) from 1988 mega man 2. Pause weapon-select — letter-cursor for M/F/H/A/B/Q/W/C/S + Item-1/2/3. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Pause weapon-select — letter-cursor for M/F/H/A/B/Q/W/C/S + Item-1/2/3
